title: Creamy Braised Chicken
description: A rich and comforting dish that combines the flavors of creamy sauce and braised meat, perfect for a cozy evening.

ingredients.name: heavy cream
ingredients.notes: or substitute with half-and-half or coconut cream

instructions: Season the chicken with salt and pepper.
In a large Dutch oven, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
Sear the chicken until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes per side.
Remove the chicken from the pot and set aside.
Add the minced garlic to the pot and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add the spicy sauce to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the braising liquid to the pot and bring to a simmer.
Return the chicken to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and braise for 20-25 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the heavy cream and continue to braise for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened.
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with chopped parsley.
